tagline: Turns a prior-auth request + chart into an approval or a clean determination — a medical director signs every denial.
audience: Payer UM lead / provider revenue lead
problem: Prior authorization is the most-hated administrative burden in US healthcare — slow, manual, and a denial without a physician signature is a legal and reputational landmine.
outcome: Routine requests are auto-approved against criteria in minutes; only genuine medical-necessity calls reach a medical director, who signs every adverse determination.

steps.does: Pull the auth request and clinical chart from the EHR
Match the request against medical-necessity criteria (MCG / InterQual / NCD-LCD)
Run gold-card, ERISA-plan and appeal-rights checks; draft the determination
A plan medical director signs every denial / adverse determination
Transmit the determination to the provider via the X12 278 / FHIR portal
Track turnaround SLAs and route appeals
